creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text: As a background, the 3.x series merged hashcat and oclHashcat programs and old hashcat was renamed to hashcat-legacy, for which I made a port for users that can't get OpenCL to work. Some time after 9.3 and 10.1 are EOL, I'll add at least ocl-icd as a port dependency but until then the pkg-message describes what to do.
